Welcome to
Sol & Sol Pharmaceutical

Sol & Sol Pharmaceutical has been manufacturing Infant Babies Milk, dietary supplements, vitamins, minerals and other natural health care products for more than 10 years. Our 30+ years of expertise in family owned pharmaceutical business has enabled us to identify industry trends far ahead of the competition. Sol & Sol Pharmaceutical has invested heavily in extensive manufacturing, well equipped laboratory, modern instruments, efficient distribution and warehousing capabilities that position us for future growth and allow us to serve better both domestically and internationally.

News , Social , Uncategorized

Top 4 Antioxidants For A Healthier and Younger Look

At our farm our belief is that quality starts from the source. Fresh quality milk comes from healthy cows that’s is why we operate closely and efficiently with our farmers to ensure care of our cows. This also means that milk is obtained from our healthy cows which are not treated by artificial hormones (rbst) and is tested.

Links & Quotes , Uncategorized

Top 5 Reasons for Consuming Food Supplements

We are proud of how our Dutch, Australian and Holstein Friesian cows are breed and treated. Which is our utmost responsibility to receive and provide healthy fresh milk. Unfortunately, several dairy farms keep their cows in dire conditions and confined which is of concern. But luckily our cows are treated with all the love

What is the Importance of Vitamins and Minerals in Our Body?

When you choose us, you are choosing our exceptional organic products whose ingredients are brought together to provide you with the freshest taste. Our farm is dedicated to farming responsibly, sustainability, and effectively products to reduce waste.
